channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah Hockey Club narrows the choice of a permanent name to three finalists. It won't be the Yeti
item.description: The Utah Hockey Club has chosen three finalists for the permanent team name it will adopt beginning with the 2025-26 NHL season.
item.dc:creator: John Coon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Super Bowl LIX will be 'No Drone Zone' amid incursions
item.description: Airspace over the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans will be heavily restricted from drones during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Objections flow in on NCAA settlement over 'unnecessarily harsh' impact of roster limits
item.description: Most of the objections posted Wednesday to the lawsuit settlement set to alter the college-sports model concerned the impact roster limits will have on players in so-called “Olympic sports,” some of whom have already been cut from their teams.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ohio State quality control coach placed on leave amid university investigation
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Ohio State defensive quality control coach Joe Lyberger has been on paid administrative leave for the last month while the university investigates him. Ohio State's human resources department sent Lyberger a letter on Dec. 27 that noted he would be placed on leave immediately.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NHL's LA Kings, Anaheim Ducks to play preseason game at Mechanics Bank Arena
item.description: Mechanics Bank Arena officials said the NHL is returning to Bakersfield for an exhibition game for the first time in 10 years.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caitlin Clark declines invite to a 3-point shootout at NBA All-Star weekend
item.description: Caitlin Clark is going to wait until Indianapolis hosts the WNBA All-Star weekend to enter her first 3-point contest.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NBA players Rudy Gobert, Mouhamed Gueye nearly hit by falling debris during game
item.description: Minnesota Timberwolves center Rudy Gobert and Atlanta Hawks big man Mouhamed Gueye walked away unscathed as a piece of debris fell from the Target Center jumbotron.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The US Open tennis tournament is adding a 15th day by moving to a Sunday start in 2025
item.description: The U.S. Open is expanding to 15 days this year, shifting to a Sunday start for the first time in the Open era that began in 1968.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin prioritizes recovery over chasing World Cup win No. 100 in return from ski crash
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin's pursuit of World Cup win No. 100 isn't at the top of her priority list on the eve of her return to ski racing two months after a serious crash. For her, the slalom competition Thursday in Courchevel, France, is simply the next step in getting her health back to 100%.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RFK Jr has NFL star Aaron Rodgers' full support ahead of confirmation hearing
item.description: New York Jets star Aaron Rodgers has been in Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s corner for quite some time and has expressed support for his endeavor as Health and Human Services secretary.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rick Pitino-coached St. John's completes the program's first unbeaten January since 1985
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Rick Pitino joked that senior guard Kadary Richmond was like a fine wine. “He keeps getting better with age,” Pitino quipped. “And he’s 35.” Even if he was 35 and not 23, Richmond still would not have been born the last time St. John's got through January without a loss.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brea scores 18 to lead No. 12 Kentucky past No. 8 Tennessee 78-73
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Koby Brea scored 18 points to lead No. 12 Kentucky to a 78-73 victory over No. 8 Tennessee on Tuesday night. Jaxson Robinson added 17 points as the Wildcats (15-5, 4-3 Southeastern Conference) snapped a two-game skid.
item.dc:creator: AL LESAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucs QB Baker Mayfield to make second Pro Bowl appearance
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield was named to the 2025 Pro Bowl Games on Tuesday, marking his second appearance in two years.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: UVU hoping to make first NCAA Tournament
item.description: OREM, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Duke, Michigan State, Auburn, Houston andUtah Valley? All of those college basketball teams own double-digit winning streaks right now, with the Wolverines having just won their tenth in a row.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Vanderbilt fined $500K after fans storm basketball court after victory over Kentucky
item.description: Officials said Vanderbilt will need to pay the University of Kentucky $500,000 for a third offense under the league's current policy.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Guerry, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — On the same evening the Chicago Bears are reportedly hiring their next defensive coordinator, the Bears have also committed to a new offensive coordinator under first-year head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford ruled out of AFC title game vs. Chiefs with a concussion
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford was ruled out of the AFC title game against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday night with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: USU improves to 18-2 after blowout win at Air Force
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team continues to roll through the Mountain West Conference. The Aggies improved to 8-1 in league play, 18-2 overall, picking up an 87-58 road win over Air Force at Clune Arena.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kneepkens scores 32 as Utes hold off BYU, 81-76
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The last time Gianna Kneepkens played against BYU, she suffered a season-ending knee injury in December of 2023. This time around, Kneepkens had one of the best days of her career.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Legendary former USC football coach will reportedly return to the NFL
item.description: A former National Championship-winning coach for the University of Southern California is taking his talents back to the NFL.
item.dc:creator: KTLA 5

item.title: Aggies make 16 three-pointers in bounce-back win
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Following its first road loss of the season, the Utah State basketball team shot the lights out at the Spectrum in a 90-69 victory over Nevada Wednesday night. Ian Martinez led the way with 23 points, making 7 of 9 from beyond the arc. Utah State was 16-of-30 (.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
